mapper.select: SELECT id, return_request_id as "returnRequestId", order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", warehouse_id as "warehouseId", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", return_type as "returnType", refund_amount as "refundAmount", inspection_result as "inspectionResult", inspection_notes as "inspectionNotes", restocked_quantity as "restockedQuantity", damaged_quantity as "damagedQuantity", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.return_processing_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.return_processing_flat GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT id, return_request_id as "returnRequestId", order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", warehouse_id as "warehouseId", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", return_type as "returnType", refund_amount as "refundAmount", inspection_result as "inspectionResult", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.return_processing_flat WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
